function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0002
alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-11-03
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-03                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

next_step.current_state: Invoice OCR/frontmatter migration write succeeded. Outbox verification context appears non-applicable (file was finance record, not outbox message). Next required inbox workflow step is deleting processed inbox item.
Completed requested oldest inbox task: migrated specified invoice to schema-compliant frontmatter, preserved original body verbatim, and deleted processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after fully completing its request.

function.message: Done. I worked the oldest inbox message by OCR-structuring `50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md` into YAML frontmatter (schema-compliant invoice fields and line items), preserved the existing note body below the frontmatter, and then removed the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree -> AGENTS -> context), loaded relevant workflow and schema docs before task work, used visible note data only, preserved original file body verbatim under frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` explicitly asked to OCR-structure the specified invoice. The target invoice file contained all required schema fields and line items, enabling a complete migration per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` and `99_system/workflows/migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md`. After completion, deletion of the processed inbox file was required by `99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md` and `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD`.
